title: Pixel Icon Library
html_prompt: Create a single-file HTML/CSS/JS or React preview for EC LAB that presents a clean vertical pixel icon library archive. Use a soft off-white background, white rounded category cards, subtle thin borders, light shadows, rose accent details, and system sans typography. Each row should show a group of playful pixel-style item icons on the left and compact category metadata on the right, including title, short description, icon count, and index number. Include EC LAB / ec 的实验室 branding, a small top identity block, and a minimal footer with Record. Explore. Share. Use only local/system fonts and EC radius tokens. No external assets, no CDN, no frameworks unless React/Tailwind is already available in the host app.

css.--font-sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
css.--font-cn: "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "Noto Sans SC", system-ui, sans-serif
